seo.title: Building Content Generation with Claude Tool Use + Vex Guardrails
seo.description: Learn how to build content generation with Claude Tool Use + Vex guardrails. Detect failures, prevent drift, and ensure reliability.

content.intro: Building content generation agents with Claude's tool use enables dynamic, LLM-powered creation of articles, social posts, and marketing copy tailored to brand needs. However, without verification, these agents risk producing factually inaccurate, off-brand, or plagiarized content due to cascading tool errors or inconsistent reasoning. Vex guardrails ensure reliability by verifying tool outputs against brand voice, facts, originality, tone, and SEO standards before final delivery.

architectureOverview.heading: Content Generation Architecture with Claude Tool Use
architectureOverview.description:
The architecture begins with a user prompt specifying content type, brand guidelines, and topic. Claude's tool use layer invokes parallel tools for research (web search, fact APIs), brand voice analysis, SEO keyword research, and draft generation. An agentic loop refines outputs through critique tools and editorial checks, culminating in a final polished piece.

Tool chains handle fact-checking via APIs like Perplexity or Wikipedia, originality via plagiarism detectors, and tone via sentiment analysis. Parallel calls optimize speed but introduce conflicts if tools disagree on facts or style. Vex wraps these tool responses to resolve inconsistencies and enforce guidelines.

The final output passes through a verification gate ensuring compliance before publication, preventing reputational damage from unverified AI content.

risks.name: Cascading Fact Errors
risks.description: Early research tool failures propagate through content generation, creating articles with fabricated statistics
risks.mitigation: Vex verifies all factual claims against source APIs before content assembly

risks.name: Brand Voice Drift
risks.description: Parallel style tools return conflicting tone suggestions, resulting in inconsistent brand personality
risks.mitigation: Vex enforces primary brand voice profile across all tool outputs

risks.name: Plagiarism Risk
risks.description: Research tools pull unoriginal phrases that survive editing without detection
risks.mitigation: Vex originality checks against web sources and internal content library

risks.name: SEO Non-Compliance
risks.description: Keyword tools suggest outdated terms or violate search engine guidelines
risks.mitigation: Vex validates SEO recommendations against current best practices and guidelines
